title: Intendant caste
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:NomAnor-NEGTC.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Nom Anor]], a member of the intendant caste]]
The '''intendant caste''' was the [[Politics/Legends|political]] and economic [[Yuuzhan Vong castes|class]] among the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Overview==
The intendants played a role similar to that of bureaucrats, organizers, and logistics personnel in other species. They were responsible for keeping supply lines open, and for supplying the obedient with their vital needs. They also tended to the creatures made by the [[Shaper caste|shapers]] and served as the [[Spy/Legends|spies]] and advanced [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] for invasion forces. While the [[Warrior caste|warriors]] and [[Priest caste|priests]] looked down on them as devious, the intendants did the actual governing of the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]], and had the ability to adapt—something the other castes lacked. Unlike the other elite castes, they did not possess a war cry and were also the smallest of the castes.

The intendants could worship any [[Yun'o|god]].

The [[Praetorite Vong]] were a military force of the Yuuzhan Vong that were dominated by the intendant caste.

==History==
Before the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the galaxy, the intendant-ruled Praetorite Vong made the initial incursion onto the worlds of the Promised Land. They were led by Prefect [[Da'Gara]] and made use of a ''"defective"'' [[yammosk]]. Despite their initial progress, the Praetorite Vong were defeated which stalled the invasion until the warrior caste arrived.

As the Yuuzhan Vong began conquering more territory from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and other governments, the new territory fell under the administration of the intendant caste.

The intendant caste joined their brethren castes after the end of the war by living in peace on the living world of [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].
